evals.expected_output: Review identifies: (1) \Drupal:: static calls inside a service class — should use injected $this->entityTypeManager; (2) SQL injection vulnerability in searchByKeyword — user input concatenated into SQL string; (3) missing type declarations on properties, parameters, and return types; (4) not using constructor property promotion with readonly; (5) $database parameter has no type hint. Should provide corrected versions.

Review identifies: (1) Doctrine annotation @Block instead of PHP attribute #[Block(...)]; (2) \Drupal:: static call inside a plugin — should use dependency injection via create()/ContainerFactoryPluginInterface; (3) missing #cache metadata on the render array (no tags, contexts, or max-age); (4) missing return type declaration on build(); (5) @Translation annotation instead of new TranslatableMarkup(). Should provide corrected version with PHP attribute, DI, and cache metadata.

Review identifies: (1) hooks should be OOP #[Hook] classes in src/Hook/ not procedural functions in .module (Drupal 11.1+); (2) missing hooks_converted: true in info.yml; (3) \Drupal::currentUser() static call in form_alter — should inject current_user service; (4) == comparison instead of === for bundle check; (5) slug generation is naive — should use a transliteration service or Pathauto. Should provide corrected OOP hook version.

Review identifies: (1) both routes missing requirements: key — no access control at all; (2) deleteItem is a state-changing GET route without CSRF protection — needs _csrf_token: 'TRUE'; (3) \Drupal:: static calls in a controller that extends ControllerBase — should use $this->entityTypeManager(); (4) loadMultiple() with no IDs loads ALL nodes — performance disaster; (5) hardcoded URLs instead of using Url::fromRoute(); (6) missing #cache metadata on render array; (7) deleteItem doesn't check if node exists before deleting — potential null dereference; (8) missing return type declarations.
